prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large green rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal cube
  - obj_5: large yellow rubber cube
  - obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0041] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0049] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0050] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0051] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0052] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0053] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0055] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0056] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects across multiple images to determine distances.

Looking at the images, I can identify the objects and estimate their 3D positions:

- obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere (left area, mid-distance)
- obj_1: large green rubber cube (middle area)
- obj_2: small brown metal cube (center-front area)
- obj_3: small green rubber sphere (front-center)
- obj_4: large purple metal cube (left-center)
- obj_5: large yellow rubber cube (right area)
- obj_6: large purple metal cylinder (behind area)
- obj_7: large blue rubber sphere (right area)
- obj_8: large red rubber cylinder (front-left)
- obj_9: small cyan metal cylinder (front area)

Let me estimate distances between pairs:

- obj_0 to obj_2: cyan sphere to brown cube - moderate distance
- obj_4 to obj_6: purple cube to purple cylinder - large distance
- obj_4 to obj_7: purple cube to blue sphere - moderate distance
- obj_4 to obj_8: purple cube to red cylinder - small-moderate distance
- obj_4 to obj_9: purple cube to cyan cylinder - large distance
- obj_5 to obj_6: yellow cube to purple cylinder - large distance
- obj_5 to obj_7: yellow cube to blue sphere - small distance
- obj_5 to obj_8: yellow cube to red cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_5 to obj_9: yellow cube to cyan cylinder - large distance
- obj_6 to obj_7: purple cylinder to blue sphere - large distance
- obj_6 to obj_8: purple cylinder to red cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_6 to obj_9: purple cylinder to cyan cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_7 to obj_8: blue sphere to red cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_7 to obj_9: blue sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_8 to obj_9: red cylinder to cyan cylinder - small distance
- obj_0 to obj_3: cyan sphere to green sphere - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_2: green cube to brown cube - small distance
- obj_1 to obj_4: green cube to purple cube - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_6: green cube to purple cylinder - large distance
- obj_1 to obj_7: green cube to blue sphere - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_8: green cube to red cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_9: green cube to cyan cylinder - large distance
